test.notes: Pytest and filtered Vitest passed; excluded known pre-existing failing suites under db/node_provider_plugins/covalt-n8n-nodes/tests.

typecheck.notes: TypeScript errors were present only in known pre-existing db/node_provider_plugins/covalt-n8n-nodes test files; no new project type errors.

lint.notes: Lint completed successfully with warnings only (no errors).

blockingIssues.description: node_route_index.resolve_node_route_by_id still chooses duplicate route IDs by lexicographic ordering across node types, so webhook dispatch remains ambiguous when different node types share a route_id.
node_route_index collision overwrite does not rebalance _ROUTES_BY_AGENT ownership; removing an old agent can delete the active last-write-wins route mapping, causing route loss/404 behavior.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Define an explicit invariant for webhook route_id uniqueness and collision resolution in node_route_index (global uniqueness vs node-type namespacing), then require tests to enforce that invariant.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both backend-core-decoupling and the backend fix follow-up surfaced route-id correctness ambiguities; re-run review for fix-backend-scrutiny-issues still found blocking ambiguity and stale ownership behaviors in node_route_index.
